blended.narrative: Timberline is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 13.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 10" over the past week. Current depth: 47".
